steps.title: Read the actual point
steps.content: At $x=1$, the plotted data point has a $y$-coordinate of about $12$.

steps.title: Read the predicted value
steps.content: At $x=1$, the line of best fit gives a predicted $y$-value of about $11$.

steps.title: Find the difference
steps.content:
Subtract the predicted value from the actual value:
$$12-11=1$$
The answer is A.
